scripts.build:cf: npx @opennextjs/cloudflare build && mkdir -p .open-next/assets/_next && cp -r .next/static .open-next/assets/_next/ && cp -r public/. .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/cloudflare .open-next/middleware .open-next/server-functions .open-next/assets/ && cp -r .open-next/.build .open-next/assets/ && cp .open-next/worker.js .open-next/assets/_worker.js
